articles.title: Billions of meals at risk due to Iran war, says fertiliser boss
articles.summary: A shortage of fertiliser due to the Iran conflict could reduce crop yields and push prices higher, says the boss of Yara.

articles.title: Hegseth says clock paused on deadline to seek approval for Iran war
articles.summary: The US defence secretary says the timer for the president to report to Congress "pauses or stops" in a ceasefire.

articles.title: Violence in Australian town after arrest of man over girl's murder
articles.summary: Unrest took place outside hospital where man suspected of murdering a five-year-old girl was being treated.

articles.title: British couple jailed in Iran: 'We're likely to be here for a long time'
articles.summary: Lindsay and Craig Foreman are facing the reality of a 10-year prison sentence following their arrest in Iran while on a motorcycle tour last year.

articles.title: Israel releases all but two activists in Greece after intercepting Gaza aid flotilla
articles.summary: The Global Sumud Flotilla denounced the interception as "piracy", while Israel's foreign ministry called the flotilla a "PR stunt".

articles.title: Missing Oscar found after Academy Award winner blocked from taking it on flight
articles.summary: The airline said the Academy Award was safely in its care in Frankfurt and was arranging its return.

articles.title: Brazil's Congress approves plan to drastically cut Bolsonaro's jail term
articles.summary: Last year ex-president Jair Bolsonaro was sentenced to 27 years in jail for plotting a coup after losing an election.

articles.title: Myanmar ex-leader Aung San Suu Kyi moved to house arrest, military says
articles.summary: The Nobel Peace Prize laureate has been in detention since she was ousted in a military coup in 2021.

articles.title: US imposes sanctions on DR Congo ex-President Kabila alleging rebel support
articles.summary: The former leader has not responded to US accusations that he is aiming to destabilise the government.

articles.title: China scraps tariffs for all but one African nation
articles.summary: The zero-tariff regime gives China's soft power a boost, but may lead to uneven gains, say analysts.
